title: oxybaphus viscosus
intro: Oxybaphus viscosus, also known as sticky four o'clock or sticky gilia, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Oxybaphus viscosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Oxybaphus viscosus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
